The '''Corellian Dreadnaught''' was a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] used by the [[Five Worlds]].

==Characteristics==
[[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] Dreadnaughts had egg-shaped hulls that were painted blue. Designed for close-quarters combat with enemy ships, primarily [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], they were equipped with missile launchers and [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] turrets spaced evenly and heavily across the hull. The [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]{{'s}} threat board estimated them as having at least twice the firepower of an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]].

==History==
These dreadnaughts were built at the [[Kiris shipyards]], located in an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]] at the edge of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]], for the Five Worlds, with construction secretly beginning around [[30 ABY/Legends|30 ABY]]. By [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], three had been built, and were used in the [[Blockade of Corellia]].

The three vessels showed even more potential than expected when they devastated several fleets in the ensuing battle. The dreadnaughts were later used in the [[Battle of Hapes (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Hapes]], where they were ultimately defeated. Two of the Dreadnaughts were destroyed in an attempt to turn the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] against the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
